channel.title: Patchstack — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Patchstack (patchstack).

item.title: CVE-2026-56050 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress PPOM for WooCommerce plugin <= 33.0.18 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Improper Access Control vulnerability in Themeisle PPOM for WooCommerce allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects PPOM for WooCommerce: from n/a through 33.0.18.

item.title: CVE-2026-54848 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress APIExperts Square for WooCommerce plugin <= 4.7.3 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Sent Data vulnerability in Saad Iqbal APIExperts Square for WooCommerce allows Retrieve Embedded Sensitive Data. This issue affects APIExperts Square for WooCommerce: from n/a through 4.7.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-54829 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress WP Photo Album Plus plugin <= 9.1.13.005 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Jacob N. Breetvelt WP Photo Album Plus allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects WP Photo Album Plus: from n/a through 9.1.13.005.

item.title: CVE-2026-54836 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Filter & Grids plugin <= 3.11.5 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in YMC Filter allows SQL Injection. This issue affects YMC Filter: from n/a through 3.11.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-54842 · 8.1 HIGH — WordPress Royal MCP plugin <= 1.4.25 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Royal Plugins Royal MCP allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Royal MCP: from n/a through 1.4.25.

item.title: CVE-2026-57429 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WordPress Slim SEO plugin <= 4.6.2 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Contributor Broken Access Control in Slim SEO <= 4.6.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56071 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Forminator plugin <= 1.53.1 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Forminator <= 1.53.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56054 · 7.7 HIGH — WordPress JS Help Desk plugin <= 3.1.1 - Arbitrary File Deletion vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber Arbitrary File Deletion in JS Help Desk <= 3.1.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56053 · 8.8 HIGH — WordPress EventPrime plugin <= 4.3.4.1 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber PHP Object Injection in EventPrime <= 4.3.4.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56051 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress TablePress plugin <= 3.3.1 - Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in TablePress <= 3.3.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56049 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Post Snippets plugin <= 4.0.19 - Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability
item.description: Contributor Remote Code Execution (RCE) in Post Snippets <= 4.0.19 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56042 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Advanced Order Export For WooCommerce plugin <= 4.0.9 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Customer Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Advanced Order Export For WooCommerce <= 4.0.9 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56023 · 5.4 MEDIUM — WordPress UPI QR Code Payment Gateway for WooCommerce plugin <= 1.6.2 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Customer Broken Access Control in UPI QR Code Payment Gateway for WooCommerce <= 1.6.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56014 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Master Slider plugin <= 3.11.2 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Master Slider <= 3.11.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56013 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress License Manager for WooCommerce plugin <= 3.0.15 - Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) in License Manager for WooCommerce <= 3.0.15 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56006 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress H5P plugin <= 1.17.6 - Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in H5P <= 1.17.6 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56005 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress WP Activity Log plugin <= 5.6.3.1 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in WP Activity Log <= 5.6.3.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54849 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Premmerce Wishlist for WooCommerce plugin <= 1.1.11 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL Injection in Premmerce Wishlist for WooCommerce <= 1.1.11 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54845 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress MDTF plugin <= 1.3.8 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Local File Inclusion in MDTF <= 1.3.8 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54844 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress CheckView Automated Testing plugin <= 2.1.0 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in CheckView Automated Testing <= 2.1.0 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54843 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress MDTF plugin <= 1.3.7 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL Injection in MDTF <= 1.3.7 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54841 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Vitepos plugin <= 3.4.2 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Sensitive Data Exposure in Vitepos <= 3.4.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54838 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress WC Vendors Marketplace plugin <= 2.6.8 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber SQL Injection in WC Vendors Marketplace <= 2.6.8 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54830 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Five Star Restaurant Reservations plugin <= 2.7.19 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in Five Star Restaurant Reservations <= 2.7.19 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54828 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Motors plugin <= 1.4.109 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in Motors <= 1.4.109 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54823 · 9.9 CRITICAL — WordPress Widget Options plugin <= 4.2.3 - Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability
item.description: Contributor Remote Code Execution (RCE) in Widget Options <= 4.2.3 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54822 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress SALESmanago & Leadoo plugin <= 3.11.2 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber SQL Injection in SALESmanago & Leadoo <= 3.11.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-54821 · 7.4 HIGH — WordPress Visual Link Preview plugin <= 2.3.1 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber Sensitive Data Exposure in Visual Link Preview <= 2.3.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-27366 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress MainWP Child plugin <= 6.1.1 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in MainWP Child <= 6.1.1 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57619 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WordPress Elementor Website Builder plugin <= 4.1.3 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Contributor Sensitive Data Exposure in Elementor Website Builder <= 4.1.3 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-56052 · 7.6 HIGH — WordPress Funnel Builder by FunnelKit plugin <= 3.15.0.5 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in FunnelKit Funnel Builder by FunnelKit allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Funnel Builder by FunnelKit: from n/a through 3.15.0.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-56024 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress WP EasyPay plugin <= 4.4.0 - Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Saad Iqbal WP EasyPay allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects WP EasyPay: from n/a through 4.4.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-56012 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Media LIbrary Assistant plugin <= 3.35 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in David Lingren Media LIbrary Assistant allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Media LIbrary Assistant: from n/a through 3.35.

item.title: CVE-2026-56009 · 5.9 MEDIUM — WordPress Bricksable for Bricks Builder plugin <= 1.6.83 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Bricksable for Bricks Builder allows Stored XSS. This issue affects Bricksable for Bricks Builder: from n/a through 1.6.83.

item.title: CVE-2026-56007 · 5.9 MEDIUM — WordPress Ocean Product Sharing plugin <= 2.2.2 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in OceanWP Ocean Product Sharing allows Stored XSS. This issue affects Ocean Product Sharing: from n/a through 2.2.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-54812 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Motors plugin <= 1.4.109 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in StylemixThemes Motors allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Motors: from n/a through 1.4.109.

item.title: CVE-2026-54810 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Nexi XPay plugin <= 8.3.1 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Nexi Payments Nexi XPay allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Nexi XPay: from n/a through 8.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-54809 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress GIFT4U plugin <= 1.0.10 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in VillaTheme GIFT4U allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects GIFT4U: from n/a through 1.0.10.

item.title: CVE-2026-54808 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress WP Travel Gutenberg Blocks plugin <= 3.9.4 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in WP Travel WP Travel Gutenberg Blocks allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects WP Travel Gutenberg Blocks: from n/a through 3.9.4.

item.title: CVE-2025-69189 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress JobBank plugin <= 1.2.3 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in EMV JobBank allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects JobBank: from n/a through 1.2.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-69128 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress JobCareer theme <= 7.3 - Arbitrary File Deletion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in EMV JobCareer allows Path Traversal. This issue affects JobCareer: from n/a through 7.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-60236 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Creatify theme <= 1.5 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in EMV Creatify allows Object Injection. This issue affects Creatify: from n/a through 1.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-60231 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress The Hospital theme <= 1.8.1 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in EMV The Hospital nrghospital allows Object Injection. This issue affects The Hospital: from n/a through 1.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-54813 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress SureDash plugin <= 1.8.0 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Brainstorm Force SureDash allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects SureDash: from n/a through 1.8.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-54814 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Motors plugin <= 1.4.109 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in StylemixThemes Motors allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Motors: from n/a through 1.4.109.

item.title: CVE-2026-54815 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Cargo Shipping Location for WooCommerce plugin <= 5.6 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Cargo RD Cargo Shipping Location for WooCommerce allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Cargo Shipping Location for WooCommerce: from n/a th…

item.title: CVE-2026-54816 · 7.5 HIGH — WordPress Advanced Ads plugin <= 2.0.21 - Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Monetizemore Advanced Ads allows Remote Code Inclusion. This issue affects Advanced Ads: from n/a through 2.0.21.

item.title: CVE-2026-54817 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress MStore API plugin <= 4.18.4 - Broken Authentication vulnerability
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in FluxBuilder MStore API allows Password Recovery Exploitation. This issue affects MStore API: from n/a through 4.18.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-54818 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Slimstat Analytics plugin <= 5.4.11 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in VeronaLabs Slimstat Analytics allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Slimstat Analytics: from n/a through 5.4.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-54819 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Listdom plugin <= 5.4.0 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Webilia Inc. Listdom allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Listdom: from n/a through 5.4.0.
